title: selenia aurea
intro: Selenia aurea, also known as the golden selenia, is a type of flowering plant in the selenicereus genus that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selenia aurea include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
